name: typescript-starter
description: TypeScript starter project for xTaskJS with Express, unit tests, and integration tests.

scripts.prepare:xtask: npm install --prefix vendor/xtask && npm run build --prefix vendor/xtask/packages/common && npm run build --prefix vendor/xtask/packages/core && npm run build --prefix vendor/xtask/packages/express-http && rm -rf vendor/packs && mkdir -p vendor/packs && npm pack ./vendor/xtask/packages/common --pack-destination ./vendor/packs && npm pack ./vendor/xtask/packages/core --pack-destination ./vendor/packs && npm pack ./vendor/xtask/packages/express-http --pack-destination ./vendor/packs
scripts.dev: nodemon --watch main.ts --watch src --ext ts,html,js,css --exec "node -r ts-node/register main.ts"
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && npm run copy:assets
